  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in labor_jobs Google Trends searches for 'gig economy' signals bullish XLY",

      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true

    "behavior": "A surge in interest for gig economy jobs indicates increased consumer spending flexibility and labor market fluidity, benefiting consumer discretionary sectors.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Higher gig economy interest often precedes consumer discretionary spending increases."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If weekly Google Trends search interest for 'gig economy' rises more than 15% week-over-week",
      "exit": "After 3 weeks or if interest drops below 5% above baseline",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 18,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Gig economy interest fluctuates frequently with labor market changes and news cycles."
  },
